badges.Id: Unique identifier for each badge awarded to users.
badges.UserId: Identifier linking the badge to a specific user in the system.
badges.Name: Descriptive title of the badge representing user achievements or roles.
badges.Date: Timestamp indicating when the badge was awarded to the user.

comments.Id: Unique identifier for each comment in the database.
comments.PostId: References the specific post associated with the comment.
comments.Score: Numeric rating indicating the quality or relevance of the comment.
comments.Text: Content of the comment, providing user feedback or discussion.
comments.CreationDate: Timestamp marking when the comment was created.
comments.UserId: Identifier for the user who made the comment.
comments.UserDisplayName: Display name of the user, often anonymized or pseudonymous.

postHistory.Id: Unique identifier for each post history entry.
postHistory.PostHistoryTypeId: Identifier for the type of post history action performed.
postHistory.PostId: Identifier for the specific post associated with the history entry.
postHistory.RevisionGUID: Unique global identifier for tracking revisions of posts.
postHistory.CreationDate: Timestamp indicating when the post history entry was created.
postHistory.UserId: Identifier for the user who made the changes, can be null.
postHistory.Text: Content of the post history entry, detailing changes made.
postHistory.Comment: Description of the specific edits or actions taken on the post.
postHistory.UserDisplayName: Display name of the user associated with the post history entry.

postLinks.Id: Unique identifier for each post link entry in the database.
postLinks.CreationDate: Timestamp indicating when the post link was created.
postLinks.PostId: Identifier for the original post associated with the link.
postLinks.RelatedPostId: Identifier for the related post linked to the original post.
postLinks.LinkTypeId: Numeric code representing the type of relationship between posts.

posts.Id: Unique identifier for each post, ensuring distinct entries in the database.
posts.PostTypeId: Categorizes the type of post, such as question or answer.
posts.AcceptedAnswerId: References the post ID of the accepted answer, if applicable.
posts.CreaionDate: Timestamp indicating when the post was created, useful for chronological sorting.
posts.Score: Numeric value representing the post's popularity or quality based on user interactions.
posts.ViewCount: Total number of times the post has been viewed, indicating its reach.
posts.Body: Main content of the post, containing the user's question or answer in detail.
posts.OwnerUserId: ID of the user who created the post, linking to user profiles.
posts.LasActivityDate: Timestamp of the last activity on the post, useful for tracking engagement.
posts.Title: Brief summary or question posed in the post, providing context at a glance.
posts.Tags: Categorizes posts with relevant topics, enhancing searchability and content organization.
posts.AnswerCount: Indicates the number of answers provided for a post, reflecting engagement level.
posts.CommentCount: Tracks the number of comments on a post, showcasing user interaction and discussion.
posts.FavoriteCount: Counts how many users marked the post as a favorite, indicating its popularity.
posts.LastEditorUserId: Identifies the user who last edited the post, ensuring accountability and traceability.
posts.LastEditDate: Records the timestamp of the last edit, providing context for content updates.
posts.CommunityOwnedDate: Marks when the community took ownership of the post, indicating collaborative management.
posts.ParentId: Links to the parent post or thread, establishing a hierarchy in discussions.
posts.ClosedDate: Records when the post was closed, indicating the end of active engagement.
posts.OwnerDisplayName: Displays the username of the post owner, personalizing the content and authorship.
posts.LastEditorDisplayName: Identifies the user who last edited the post, enhancing accountability and traceability.

tags.Id: Unique identifier for each tag, ensuring distinct entries in the database.
tags.TagName: Descriptive label for the tag, representing key concepts or topics.
tags.Count: Frequency of the tag's usage, indicating its popularity or relevance.
tags.ExcerptPostId: Identifier for posts associated with the tag, linking content to its context.
tags.WikiPostId: Identifier for related wiki posts, providing additional information on the tag.

users.Id: Unique identifier for each user in the database.
users.Reputation: Numeric score reflecting user contributions and community trust.
users.CreationDate: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.
users.DisplayName: User's chosen name displayed publicly on the platform.
users.LastAccessDate: Timestamp of the user's most recent activity on the platform.
users.WebsiteUrl: User's personal or professional website link, often optional.
users.Location: Geographical location of the user, providing context for their contributions.
users.AboutMe: User's self-description, offering insights into their interests and background.
users.Views: Count of how many times the user's content has been viewed.
users.UpVotes: Number of positive votes received by the user's contributions.
users.DownVotes: Counts the number of downvotes received by a user, indicating negative feedback.
users.AccountId: Unique identifier for each user account, essential for user management and tracking.
users.Age: User's age, providing demographic insights, though many entries are missing.
users.ProfileImageUrl: URL linking to the user's profile image, enhancing personalization and identity.

votes.Id: Unique identifier for each vote entry in the database.
votes.PostId: Identifier linking the vote to a specific post or content item.
votes.VoteTypeId: Categorizes the type of vote, indicating its nature or purpose.
votes.CreationDate: Date when the vote was cast, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.
votes.UserId: Identifier for the user who cast the vote, with many entries being NULL.
votes.BountyAmount: Amount of bounty associated with the vote, often indicating reward value.
